nasb.text: These are the families of Levi: the family of the Libnites, the family of the Hebronites, the family of the Mahlites, the family of the Mushites, the family of the Korahites. Kohath became the father of Amram.

esv.text: These are the clans of Levi: the clan of the Libnites, the clan of the Hebronites, the clan of the Mahlites, the clan of the Mushites, the clan of the Korahites. And Kohath was the father of Amram.

cnv.text: 這些就是利未的各家族：有立尼家族、希伯倫家族、瑪利家族、母示家族、可拉家族。哥轄生暗蘭。

ccb.text: 立尼族、希伯仑族、玛利族、姆示族和可拉族也是利未的子孙。哥辖生暗兰。
